claimText: The State Health Regulatory Excellence Index (SHRESTH) was launched by the Union Health Ministry.
evidenceExcerpt: Union Health Ministry launched State Health Regulatory Excellence Index (SHRESTH)
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the launching ministry of the SHRESTH initiative.
distractorHooks: Launched by the Ministry of Chemicals and Fertilizers
Launched by the Indian Medical Association

claimText: The SHRESTH initiative was proposed by the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO).
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question regarding the proposing body of the SHRESTH initiative.
distractorHooks: Proposed by the Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR)
Proposed by the Pharmacy Council of India
Proposed by the National Medical Commission

claimText: The primary aim of the SHRESTH initiative is to benchmark and strengthen state drug regulatory systems across India to ensure drug safety and quality.
evidenceExcerpt: Aim: To drive improvements in the performance of state drug regulatory authorities across India, ensuring drug safety and quality standards are consistently met.
examUse: Statement-based question testing the objective of the SHRESTH initiative.
distractorHooks: Aims to regulate prices of essential medicines
Aims to provide free generic drugs to BPL families
Aims to centralize all drug manufacturing approvals under the Union government
